worktree_state.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<!--
  ~ Adaptive icon configuration for Android 8.0+ (API 26+)
  ~ Defines the launcher icon using separate background and foreground layers
  ~ This allows the system to apply different shapes (circle, rounded square, etc.)
  ~ based on device manufacturer and user preferences
  -->
<adaptive-icon xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">
    <background android:drawable="@drawable/ic_launcher_background" />
    <foreground android:drawable="@drawable/ic_launcher_foreground" />
</adaptive-icon>

task_intent.title: 001-initialize-project-scaffolding-with-standard-andro
task_intent.description: Scaffold a standard Android project structure with Gradle build files, an Application class, a main Activity, and a manifest. This establishes the foundational code patterns that all future features will build upon.
